epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis; red flags (pain, photophobia, vision loss, corneal involvement) require urgent referral

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often treated in primary care/pharmacy settings
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care and allergy drops; antibiotics for suspected bacterial; hygiene and outbreak control
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Self-medication and antibiotic overuse; outbreak control in crowded settings
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Low-cost symptomatic care and strong eye care programs in many states
